sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55860" key="kateuhmere/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατευ-ημερέω</orth>, <sense id="n55860.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be influential</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κατευημερηκὼς παρ᾽ ὑμῖν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.89</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
